Tab.Label: Enchantments & Gems
Tab.Tooltip: Configure enchantment slots and gem sockets

EGS.MechanicalChangesHint: These entries are synchronized into PF1e's native ItemChange system. Use PF1e change targets and bonus types supported by PF1e 11.11.
EGS.MaximumRankHint: A maximum rank of 0 means no rank limit for this item.

Drop.Enchantment: Drop an Item here to create an enchantment reference
Drop.Gem: Drop an Item here to create a gem reference

Effects.NativeHint: Mechanical changes use PF1e 11.11's native ItemChange engine. Physical-item changes are ultimately governed by PF1e's active-item rules, including equipped state, quantity, and item hit points.

Unidentified.HiddenDetails: The item's enchantment and gem details are hidden while the item is unidentified.

Validation.EmptyName: An enchantment or gem must have a name.
Validation.EmptyFormula: Mechanical changes must have a formula.
Validation.RankTooHigh: {name} is rank {rank}, but this item permits rank {max} or lower.
Validation.MissingSource: The referenced source Item for {name} no longer exists.
Validation.MissingChangeTarget: {name} has a mechanical change with no PF1e target.
Validation.InvalidChangeTarget: {name} uses '{target}', which is not in PF1e's current change-target catalog.
Validation.InvalidBonusType: {name} uses '{type}', which is not in PF1e's current bonus-type catalog.

Warning.DropItemOnly: Only Foundry Item documents can be dropped into a slot area.
Warning.SourceMissing: The referenced document could not be found.

Error.InvalidItem: A valid Foundry Item document is required.
Error.NotOwner: You do not own this item.
Error.PlayerInstallDisabled: Players are not allowed to install or edit enchantments and gems.
Error.PlayerRemoveDisabled: Players are not allowed to remove enchantments and gems.
Error.EntryNotFound: The requested enchantment or gem could not be found.
Error.InvalidImport: The JSON file could not be read: {error}
Error.IncompatibleImport: This JSON file is not a compatible Enchantment and Gem Slots export.

Notification.Imported: Imported data for {imported} items; {missing} item UUIDs were not found.
Notification.Migrated: Migrated enchantment and gem data on {count} items.

GMManager.Title: Enchantment & Gem Slot Manager
GMManager.NoItems: No items currently contain module data.

GMManager.Name: Enchantment & Gem Slot Manager
GMManager.Label: Open Manager
GMManager.Hint: Review, validate, recalculate, import, and export enchantment and gem data across the world.

EnableEnchantments.Name: Enable Enchantment Slots
EnableEnchantments.Hint: Show and process enchantment slots on supported items.

EnableGems.Name: Enable Gem Slots
EnableGems.Hint: Show and process gem sockets on supported items.

EnableOtherPhysical.Name: Enable Other Physical Item Types
EnableOtherPhysical.Hint: Add the slot interface to PF1e physical items beyond weapons and equipment when those item documents support changes.

EnforceRank.Name: Enforce Maximum Enchantment Rank
EnforceRank.Hint: Prevent enchantments whose rank exceeds the item's configured maximum rank.

RankZeroFree.Name: Rank 0 Enchantments Use No Slots
RankZeroFree.Hint: Treat rank 0 enchantments as having an effective slot cost of 0.

AllowOverSlotting.Name: Allow Player Over-Slotting
AllowOverSlotting.Hint: Permit item owners to exceed available slots. Gamemasters can always override slot limits.

GMOverrideRank.Name: Allow GM Rank Overrides
GMOverrideRank.Hint: Permit Gamemasters to install enchantments above an item's maximum rank.

PlayerInstall.Name: Allow Player Installation and Editing
PlayerInstall.Hint: Allow owners to add, edit, and enable or disable entries on their items.

PlayerRemove.Name: Allow Player Removal
PlayerRemove.Hint: Allow owners to remove enchantments and gems from their items.

EnableEffects.Name: Enable Native PF1e Mechanical Changes
EnableEffects.Hint: Synchronize enabled entry changes into the item's native PF1e system.changes array.

ShowWarnings.Name: Show Validation Warnings
ShowWarnings.Hint: Display over-slot, rank, missing-source, and incomplete-change warnings.

ShowChat.Name: Show Post-to-Chat Button
ShowChat.Hint: Allow users to post an item's slot summary to chat.

Debug.Name: Enable Debug Logging
Debug.Hint: Write additional module diagnostics to the browser console.

DefaultEnchantWeapon.Name: Default Weapon Enchantment Slots
DefaultEnchantWeapon.Hint: Base enchantment slots for weapons without an item-specific override.

DefaultEnchantArmor.Name: Default Armor Enchantment Slots
DefaultEnchantArmor.Hint: Base enchantment slots for equipment with the armor subtype.

DefaultEnchantShield.Name: Default Shield Enchantment Slots
DefaultEnchantShield.Hint: Base enchantment slots for equipment with the shield subtype.

DefaultEnchantWondrous.Name: Default Wondrous Enchantment Slots
DefaultEnchantWondrous.Hint: Base enchantment slots for wondrous equipment, including slotted rings and similar items.

DefaultEnchantOtherEquipment.Name: Default Other Equipment Enchantment Slots
DefaultEnchantOtherEquipment.Hint: Base enchantment slots for other PF1e equipment subtypes.

DefaultEnchantOtherPhysical.Name: Default Other Physical Enchantment Slots
DefaultEnchantOtherPhysical.Hint: Base enchantment slots for optional physical item types beyond weapons and equipment.

DefaultGemWeapon.Name: Default Weapon Gem Slots
DefaultGemWeapon.Hint: Base gem slots for weapons without an item-specific override.

DefaultGemArmor.Name: Default Armor Gem Slots
DefaultGemArmor.Hint: Base gem slots for equipment with the armor subtype.

DefaultGemShield.Name: Default Shield Gem Slots
DefaultGemShield.Hint: Base gem slots for equipment with the shield subtype.

DefaultGemWondrous.Name: Default Wondrous Gem Slots
DefaultGemWondrous.Hint: Base gem slots for wondrous equipment, including slotted rings and similar items.

DefaultGemOtherEquipment.Name: Default Other Equipment Gem Slots
DefaultGemOtherEquipment.Hint: Base gem slots for other PF1e equipment subtypes.

DefaultGemOtherPhysical.Name: Default Other Physical Gem Slots
DefaultGemOtherPhysical.Hint: Base gem slots for optional physical item types beyond weapons and equipment.
